title: cyclosorus lenormandii
intro: Cyclosorus lenormandii, also known as Chinese ladder fern or Chinese button fern, is a type of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its unique, ladder-like growth habit and small, button-like leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus lenormandii are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestive health, while also possessing antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be dried and made into tea or used in infusions, or it can be processed into capsules or tinctures for easier consumption.
